_comment: Pre-authored content variant descriptions for it_operations / champion / targeted buying stage (POC demo scenario — Contact A and Contact B). Source: knowledge/kalder_doc4_content_model_and_taxonomy.md Section 5 (module type intended_axes and fallback behavior); knowledge/kalder_doc5_personalization_decisioning_rules.md Section 3 (per-module selection logic). Solution-category-level (Level 3) and account/brand-level (Level 4/5) descriptions are role-agnostic by design — per the module spec's own fallback behavior, not a simplification.

hero.level_1_2: Stop firefighting incidents one Slack thread at a time — see every IT operations signal your team needs in one place, built for the people who own uptime.
hero.level_3: IT Operations teams use Kalder to cut incident response time and reduce tool sprawl across monitoring, alerting, and on-call workflows.
hero.level_4: Kalder helps technical teams operate with less noise and more signal.
hero.level_5: Kalder — the buying group personalization platform for B2B revenue teams.

benefits.level_1_2: Built for Champions driving IT operations modernization: consolidate alert noise, cut mean time to resolution, and give your team one source of truth instead of five disconnected dashboards.
benefits.level_3: IT Operations buyers choose Kalder to reduce tool sprawl and cut incident response time.
benefits.level_4: Kalder reduces operational noise and gives technical teams a single source of truth.
benefits.level_5: Kalder helps revenue and technical teams work from the same signal.

cta.level_1: See your incident response time cut in half — book a 20-minute walkthrough for IT Operations Champions evaluating supplier fit.
cta.level_2: Curious what Kalder looks like for an IT operations team like yours? See a guided demo.

gated_assets.level_1_2: IT Operations Champion's Evaluation Checklist — the five questions to ask before shortlisting an alerting and incident-response vendor (gated_email).
gated_assets.level_3: IT Operations: Reducing Alert Fatigue — solution-category overview (ungated).
gated_assets.level_4: Kalder Platform Overview — brand-level capability summary (ungated).

proof.level_1_2: "We cut our mean time to resolution by 40% in the first quarter." — IT Operations Director, mid-market SaaS company (peer_case, supplier_selection-stage proof).
proof.level_3: IT Operations teams report measurable reductions in incident response time after adopting Kalder.

narrative.level_1_2: Kalder unifies the operational signal IT teams already have — alerts, incidents, on-call load — into one buying-group-aware view, so Champions can make the case for consolidation without another swivel-chair tool.
narrative.level_3: Kalder unifies operational signal across IT Operations tooling into a single view.
narrative.level_4: Kalder brings together the operational data technical teams already generate.

problem_framing.level_1_2: Your team is drowning in alerts from five different tools, and nobody can tell which ones actually matter until something breaks.
problem_framing.level_3: IT Operations teams struggle with alert fatigue and fragmented incident visibility across tools.

outcomes.level_1_2: Your on-call engineers stop context-switching between dashboards mid-incident, and your team starts measuring MTTR in minutes instead of hours.
outcomes.level_3: IT Operations teams using Kalder see faster incident resolution and less tool-switching overhead.

use_cases.level_1_2: A Champion at the supplier-selection stage uses Kalder to build the internal business case: consolidating three monitoring tools into one signal source, with before/after MTTR data ready for the budget conversation.
use_cases.level_3: IT Operations teams use Kalder to consolidate monitoring and incident response tooling.

trust_signals.level_1_2: SOC 2 Type II certified; integrates with your existing on-call and incident management stack without requiring a forklift migration.
trust_signals.level_3: Kalder maintains SOC 2 Type II certification across all solution categories.
trust_signals.level_4: Kalder is SOC 2 Type II certified and built for enterprise security requirements.

progressive_disclosure.level_2: You seem to be evaluating as an IT Operations decision-maker. Is that right? Tell us more to see content built for your role.
progressive_disclosure.level_3: Tell us who you are so we can tailor what you see next.
progressive_disclosure.level_4: What brings you to Kalder today? A quick answer helps us show you the most relevant information.
